introParagraphs.1: I am an advanced Computer & Science Engineering student with a strong focus on software development, initially having been specialized in web development.
introParagraphs.2: I possess comprehensive knowledge of the SDLC (Software Development Life Cycle) and key core development concepts, such as the Object-Oriented Paradigm, as well as analysis and design with UML.

stackDescs.1: to build APIs and server related functions

projectList.0: A Trello like app, but with simplified panels and no need to login. User data is temporaly stored in cookies and can be downloaded and imported back into the app.
projectList.1: Simple web game where your general knowledge is tested. Consumes an external API which sends data, such as questions, to the client
projectList.2: An advanced project manager which integrates Kanban methodology to fasten up development through SDLC.

myProjects.warning: This project is still in development, check its progress in GitHub
myProjects.optimization: This project still needs fixes, be aware of it if you encounter issues
